calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Feder for Jewish Family and Children's Services. Deena Zacharin (Associate Attorney of Mr. Feder. Marcella Ingram also present.

Ms. Ingram agrees to waiving of bond and Court accountings. The Court granted the Petition to Establish a Special Needs Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
